title: US Seeks to Deploy Hypersonic Missile For the First Time Against Iran
content:
The U.S. intends to deploy a hypersonic missile system.
*   This deployment is specifically targeted against Iran.
*   It marks the first time the U.S. has sought to deploy such a weapon in this context.

title: US Supreme Court curbs key Voting Rights Act provision in 6–3 conservative majority ruling
content:
The US Supreme Court has curbed a key provision of the Voting Rights Act.
*   The ruling was decided by a 6-3 majority of the justices.
*   This decision reflects the stance of the Court's conservative majority.

title: US Supreme Court calls Louisiana's House map an 'unconstitutional racial gerrymander'
content:
The US Supreme Court has issued a ruling.
*   The ruling concerns Louisiana's legislative House map.
*   The Court declared the map an "unconstitutional racial gerrymander."

title: SEBI appoints Care Ratings to vet performance and risk of market stakeholders
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   SEBI has appointed Care Ratings.
*   Care Ratings will vet the performance and risk of various market stakeholders.
*   This move aims to enhance oversight and accountability within the market.

title: RBI exempts small NBFCs from registration
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the news headline:

*   The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has introduced an exemption for certain financial institutions.
*   Small Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs) will no longer be required to register with the central bank.
*   This move aims to reduce regulatory burden and simplify compliance for these smaller entities.

title: The King of Comedy: How Charles III used humour to reprimand Donald Trump in the US Congress
content:
King Charles III reportedly used humour.
*   His intention was to reprimand (criticize or rebuke) Donald Trump.
*   This exchange took place during an event in the US Congress.
